message:
ci: build release binary before running tests

Tests in agent_hook_output.rs and agent_json_format.rs require the
release binary at ./target/release/dcg. The check job was running
cargo nextest without building the release binary first, causing
168 test failures.

Add 'cargo build --release' step before running nextest to ensure
the binary exists when tests run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -124,6 +124,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Check compilation
         run: cargo check --all-targets
 
+      - name: Build release binary for tests
+        run: cargo build --release
+
       - name: Run tests (with JUnit XML report)
         run: |
           cargo nextest run --profile ci --no-fail-fast
